name: Monday weekly review
description: Rollup of all agents across all brands. Email + iMessage to Caner.
prompt: Run the weekly-report skill. Cover every active brand workspace under ~/.dev-houston/workspaces/. Send via Gmail and iMessage one-liner.

name: Friday PPAIOS audit
description: Run audit + level-up across the workspace. Surface top 5 gaps.
prompt: Run the audit skill workspace-wide. Then run level-up on the top gap. Send Caner an iMessage with the headline finding.

name: Daily alerts sweep
description: Read alerts.jsonl in every workspace. Escalate P1 to Caner via iMessage.
prompt: Sweep alerts.jsonl across all brand workspaces. For any P1 alert opened in the last 24h that hasn't been acknowledged, iMessage Caner with the alert and the proposed action. Append your sweep to shared-ledger.jsonl.

name: Hey Clawd iMessage poll
description: Every 15 minutes, check for new 'Hey Clawd' iMessages from Caner (+447922310915). Action them via the hey-clawd skill. Reply via iMessage.
prompt: Run the hey-clawd skill. Read the last 20 messages from +447922310915 via the iMessage MCP. For any 'Hey Clawd' message not yet followed by a 'Hey Caner' reply, parse the request, action it using whatever PPAIOS skills + Composio integrations apply, and reply via iMessage. If there are no new unactioned messages, output ROUTINE_OK and exit silently.
